releaseNotes: 1.0.5 — Home: Settings in the top bar with Search and Log out; removed bottom TV Guide / Settings row; Live TV opens the EPG grid; Movies and TV Series cards use the same gold shell as the hub. Player: removed manual buffer-size setting; live buffering tuned for smoother playback; fixed ExoPlayer DefaultLoadControl startup crash. Updates: in-app update opens the Downloader/aftv.news link after countdown (Settings dialog and background update notification).
